# Swap misplaced voter: 4 stores in 2 zones, voter_constraint requires 2
# voters in zone=b. Currently only 1 voter is in zone=b. MMA should swap a
# voter from zone=a to zone=b to satisfy the voter constraint.

set-store quiet=true
  store-id=1 node-id=1 locality-tiers=zone=a
  store-id=2 node-id=2 locality-tiers=zone=a
  store-id=3 node-id=3 locality-tiers=zone=b
  store-id=4 node-id=4 locality-tiers=zone=b
----

store-leaseholder-msg
store-id=1
  range-id=1
    store-id=1 type=VOTER_FULL leaseholder=true
    store-id=2 type=VOTER_FULL
    store-id=3 type=VOTER_FULL
    config=num_replicas=3 voter_constraints={'+zone=b':2}
----

repair-needed
----
SwapVoterForConstraints: r1

repair store-id=1
----
[mmaid=1] repair not yet implemented
pending(0)
